prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年内蒙古理科/物理类最低位次依次为约 11604→9913→11259→9316→8199，整体呈波动下行趋势（位次数字减小=竞争加剧），近 3 年累计前移约 3060 名；2025 年基准约 8199 名，为近 5 年最高水平；本区理科/物理类计划 2021–2023 年均为 92 人，2024 年增至 98 人，2025 年增至 100 人；2026 年计划 98 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招 2 人，缩招幅度约 2%，对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年约第 99–113 名（2026 年约第 113 名），排名略有下滑但仍属中上水平；该校在声誉文件中未见明显负面或正面事件，舆情平稳；抖音热度排名第 50（较热），短视频曝光量中等，反映一定报考关注度；历史投档异常记录中无该校断档信号；第五轮学科评估中该校未出现 A- 及以上等级学科，但作为交通运输类特色强校，在航海、轮机、交通运输等领域具有行业认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度持续高热推 荐，与该校理工科招生专业高度匹配，对理科考生吸引力较强；内蒙古 2026 年普通高考总人数约 15.4 万，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计约 11.6 万增长约 32%，按近年物理类占比约 72% 估算，2026 年物理类考生约 11.1 万，较 2025 年 8.37 万增长约 32.5%，竞争显著加剧；省控线方面，2025 年物理类本科批 375 分较 2024 年理科一批 471 分大幅下降，反映划线方式调整或试卷难度变化，对位次参考影响有限；该校位于辽宁大连，属东北沿海城市，对内蒙古考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在本区招 生人数占比较小（2025 年物理类 100 人），属跨省招生正常规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026 年计划小幅缩招 2 人、本区物理类考生总数大幅增长约 32%、计算机/电子信息类专业高热推荐等因素，竞争加剧效应显著大于缩招缓解效应，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 8199 名基础上继续前移（更难进），预测最低位次约 8301 名，区间 7801–8801 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术等）
- 自动化类（含自动化、电气工程及其自动化、测控技术与仪器）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、通信工程、光电信息科学与工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 法学
- 物联网工程
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、统计学）
- 机械类（含机械设计制造及其自动化、船舶与海洋工程、能源与动力工程）
- 交通运输类（含交通运输、物流工程、材料科学与工程、交通工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 管理科学与工程类（含信息管理与信息系统、大数据管理与应用、电子商务）
- 金融工程
- 经济学类（含经济学、国际经济与贸易）
- 安全工程
- 环境科学与工程类（含环境工程、海洋科学、海洋资源与环境）
- 轮机工程（陆上专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 7801–8801 内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业适当冲刺、三档专业稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<7801）可重点冲刺计算机类、自动化类等一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限 （>8801）应以三档专业为主，争取录取机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Inner Mongolia Science/Physics Category were approximately 11604→9913→11259→9316→8199, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate intensified competition), with a cumulative forward shift of about 3060 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 8199, the highest level in the past 5 years; the local Science/Physics Category plan was 92 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 98 in 2024, and to 100 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 98 students, a slight reduction of 2 students compared to 2025, a reduction of about 2%, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is approximately 99–113 in recent years (about 113th in 2026), with a slight decline but still at an upper-middle level; no significant negative or positive events were found in the reputation file, with stable public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 50th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure, reflecting a certain level of application attention; no break signals in historical admission anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university did not have A- or above disciplines, but as a characteristic strong school in transportation, it has industry recognition in navigation, marine engineering, and transportation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, electronic information/communication majors continue to be highly popular, matching the university's science and engineering admissions, strongly attracting science candidates; the total number of ordinary college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, an increase of about 32% from the combined total of about 116,000 for Physics and History categories in 2025; estimated Physics candidates in 2026 are about 111,000 based on the recent Physics proportion of about 72%, an increase of about 32.5% from 83,700 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; regarding provincial control lines, the 2025 Physics undergraduate batch score of 375 points dropped significantly from the 2024 Science first batch score of 471 points, reflecting adjustments in scoring methods or changes in exam difficulty, with limited impact on ranking reference; the university is located in Dalian, Liaoning, a coastal city in Northeast China, with some regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates; the number of local admissions is relatively small (100 Physics students in 2025), a normal scale for cross-provincial admissions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction of 2 students in the 2026 plan, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of local Physics candidates, and the high popularity of computer/electronic information majors, the intensifying competition effect is significantly greater than the alleviating effect of the reduction; it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to move forward (harder to enter) from the 2025 baseline of 8199, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 8301, in the range of 7801–8801.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Category (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.)
- Automation Category (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
- Electronic Information Category (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Law
- Internet of Things Engineering
- Mathematics Category (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Mechanical Category (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Transportation Category (including Transportation, Logistics Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Traffic Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Management Science and Engineering Category (including Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application, E-commerce)
- Financial Engineering
- Economics Category (including Economics, International Economics and Trade)
- Safety Engineering
- Environmental Science and Engineering Category (including Environmental Engineering, Marine Science, Marine Resources and Environment)
- Marine Engineering (Land-based Major).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7801–8801, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, appropriately aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safe backups; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<7801), focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer and Automation; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>8801), prioritize Tier 3 majors to secure admission opportunities.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年内蒙古文科/历史类最低位次依次为约 2647→1342→2604→3704→2018，波动较大，无明显单边趋势；2025 年基准约 2018 名；本区文科/历史类计划 2021–2022 年均为 16 人，2023 年增至 19 人，2024 年 17 人，2025 年 16 人；2026 年计划 16 人，与 2025 年持平。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科排名约第 113 名，属中上水平；该校声誉平稳，未见负面舆情；抖音热度较热，有一定关注度；无投档异常记录；该校文科招生专业（法学、工商管理类、 公共管理类、英语、日语）对应学科均未进入 A- 及以上等级，但法学作为传统文科热门专业仍具一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度分化观望，工商管理类明显劝退，外语类专业一般观望，文科整体专业热度偏 冷；内蒙古 2026 年普通高考总人数约 15.4 万，按近年历史类占比约 28% 估算，2026 年历史类考生约 4.3 万，较 2025 年 3.26 万增长约 32%，竞争加剧；省控线方面，2025 年历史类本科批 418 分较 2024 年文科一批 478 分下降，反映划线方式调整；该校位于辽宁大连，对内蒙古考生有一定地域吸引力；本区历史类招生人数稳定在 16–19 人，属正常跨省规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合计划持平、本区历史类考生总数大幅增长约 32%、文科专业热度整体偏冷等因素，竞争加剧效应主导，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 2018 名基础上小幅后移（更难进），预测最低位次约 2068 名，区间 1568–2568 名。

- 英语（需口试）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 1568–2568 内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业适当冲刺、三档专业稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<1568）可重点冲刺法学；位次接近区间上限（>2568）应以三档专业为主确保录取 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Inner Mongolia liberal arts/history category were approximately 2647→1342→2604→3704→2018, with significant fluctuations and no clear unilateral trend; the 2025 baseline is about 2018th place; the liberal arts/history category enrollment plan in this region was 16 students in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 19 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 16 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 16 students, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 113th in the Soft Science Ranking, at an upper-middle level; the university's reputation is stable with no negative public opinion; it is relatively popular on Douyin with some attention; no abnormal admission records; the liberal arts majors offered (Law, Business Administration, Public Administration, English, Japanese) have not reached A- or above in corresponding disciplines, but Law, as a traditional popular liberal arts major, still has some appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has mixed social popularity, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, foreign language majors are generally neutral, and the overall popularity of liberal arts majors is relatively cold; the total number of candidates for the 2026 ordinary college entrance examination in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, with an estimated history category proportion of about 28% in recent years, so the 2026 history category candidates are about 43,000, an increase of about 32% from 32,600 in 2025, intensifying competition; regarding the provincial control line, the 2025 history category undergraduate batch score of 418 points decreased compared to the 2024 liberal arts first batch score of 478 points, reflecting adjustments in the scoring method; the university is located in Dalian, Liaoning, which has some regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates; the history category enrollment in this region is stable at 16–19 students, a normal cross-provincial scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as unchanged enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of history category candidates in this region, and the overall cold popularity of liberal arts majors, the intensified competition effect dominates. It is predicted that the 2026 minimum ranking will slightly shift backward (harder to enter) from the 2025 baseline of 2018th place, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 2068th place, and a range of 1568–2568th place.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Financial Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Public Administration (including Public Administration, Administrative Management, Social Work)
- English (requires oral test).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Japanese (requires oral test).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1568–2568, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, appropriately aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1568), you can focus on aiming for Law; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>2568), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
